levels.name: DIPLOMATIC TENSIONS
levels.description: Sanctions and rhetoric. No military engagement.

levels.name: NAVAL STANDOFF
levels.description: Warships deployed. Seizures and standoffs. Limited skirmishes.

levels.name: LIMITED STRIKES
levels.description: Precision strikes on military targets. Tit-for-tat.

levels.name: AIR CAMPAIGN
levels.description: Sustained air operations. Infrastructure targeted. Civilian risk.

levels.name: GROUND INVASION
levels.description: Ground forces deployed. Draft considered. Regional war.

levels.name: TOTAL WAR
levels.description: Nuclear threshold. Chemical weapons. Civilization at stake.
